title: Stale Task Rescuer
purpose: Inspect a stale delegated task and decide whether to nudge, take over, abandon, or mark blocked without losing useful work.
trigger: Run when observe reports stale-needs-inspection for a delegated task.
inputs: recent worker handoff or thread status
allowedActions: classify useful committed or uncommitted work
recommend a same-task nudge or takeover
record blocked evidence in the ledger
recommend abandon only when there is no useful scoped work
forbiddenActions: delete a worktree without an explicit abandon or merged state
relabel local or proxy evidence as direct proof
gates: git diff --name-status main..HEAD when branch exists

evidence.proxy: Inferred from stale logs or partial handoff only.
evidence.local: Local repo evidence only; no runtime proof.
evidence.blocked: Missing thread, missing worktree, conflict, or human decision required.

escalation: Ask the human before deleting or abandoning useful work.
Ask the human if the task requires hardware, payment, production, or private credentials.
Stop if the stale state cannot be distinguished from a still-running worker.
